title: L_Ender 's Cataclysm Reimagined
description: Replaces L_Ender 's Cataclysm bulky 3D gui model with a sleek, classic 2D design
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/8EtY9oy.png) ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ [![a](https://i.imgur.com/v35AqUJ.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/waffy/projects) [![s](https://i.imgur.com/552aqbK.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/VladVF) [![a](https://i.imgur.com/UQg92oP.png)](https://ko-fi.com/waffyllka) ## About **Cataclysm Reimagined** transforms the bulky 3D GUI and icons from **L_Ender’s Cataclysm** into a **clean, vanilla-style 2D interface**, making the game easier to read, lighter on visuals, and more immersive. > ℹ️ **Important:** This pack only affects **GUI, HUD, and item icons**. > It does **not** change world models, blocks, or gameplay mechanics. ![befire](https://i.imgur.com/oxRdNDY.png)

![](https://i.imgur.com/3efF1uV.png)

When playing with **L_Ender’s Cataclysm**, many items strongly differ from vanilla Minecraft’s visual language. This resource pack reimagines them to better match the **classic Minecraft UI style**.

![](https://i.imgur.com/uwTAuAx.png)

### What this pack changes - Over **20 Cataclysm items redesigned into clean 2D icons** - Bulky 3D GUI elements replaced with **flat, readable visuals** - More consistent UI that blends naturally with vanilla Minecraft - Improved readability during combat and inventory management ![](https://i.imgur.com/wJX8xi2.png)

![](https://i.imgur.com/Yn0LN59.png) This resource pack also supports the following Cataclysm-related mods: * [Cataclysm Weaponery](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cataclysmweaponery) * [Cataclysm: Ignis Soulfires](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cataclysm-ignis-soulfires) * [Cataclysm Tools](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cataclysm-tools)

![](https://i.imgur.com/zturQrR.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/9SLOzmA.gif) ![](https://i.imgur.com/Hf3VqLF.png) **❔ Will this pack break my game or the mod?** ✅ **No.** This is a standard resource pack that only changes visual elements. **❔ Do I need OptiFine?** ✅ **No.** It works perfectly without OptiFine. **❔ Will you support new items in future updates?** ✅ **Yes!** New 2D icons will be added as Cataclysm receives updates.

![](https://i.imgur.com/9yJFo81.png) * **Original Mod Author:** [mcl_ender](https://www.curseforge.com/members/mcl_ender/projects) — huge thanks for the amazing mod! * **Concept Inspiration:** FreshCraft Textures > ⚖️ **Rights:** > This project is a fan-made resource pack. All rights to the original mod belong to **mcl_ender**. > This pack only enhances the visual presentation.
